name: small HR teams using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees/month tool
description: For small HR teams using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees/month, manual report generation causes compliance issues. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: small HR teams using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees/month
problem_solved: Generating accurate monthly tax withholding reports from payroll data.
